name: Jashi
description: Jashi is a yokai who has spent years bound to the [Tsuchinoko](https://anilist.co/character/309811/Tsuchinoko) sacrificial house and is known for cursing humans to commit suicide with his gaze.

name: Keiko Yukimura
description: Keiko Yukimura is a straight-A student whose personality is opposite that of [Yusuke's](https://anilist.co/character/729/Yuusuke-Urameshi). Her hobbies include cooking and cleaning. Keiko's parents run a ramen restaurant called the Yukimura Diner. After Yusuke is hit and killed by a car, he is allowed to come back to life on the condition that someone kisses him, and this ends up being Keiko. name: Luna Healer
description: __Race:__ Half Elf A Cleric of the church, Luna is seen as a saint for using her healing skills on people while listening to their problems, but she fears that using her skills will lead to a premature death like her mother's. Luna is Lola's best friend and a solo adventurer. Luna is convinced that it is her mission to save people and make them smile. She is usually a very dignified person but reveals a strange expression when Luna passes out and murmurs what she really feels.

name: Nasse
description: Nasse is Mirai's life saving's angel, and as such, knows everything Mirai has been through, everything which is related to him, notably his being being mentally abused by his aunt and uncle since they have been fostering him. She saved Mirai's life as he jumped off a building, and gave him the possibility to be happy, by giving him Freedom, and Love.

name: Yuki Minagawa
description: She is a friendly girl from class 2-1 and is both the female class representative and a member of the soft tennis club. She likes teasing people. ~!She likes Jun Furuya and enjoys teasing him by telling him she likes him. She also finds his little sister adorable.!~

name: Deedlit
description: Deedlit is a High Elf from the Faery Realm. She has a great appreciation for nature, and her magic always exhibits elemental forces, such as wind and water. She also wields a thin elven sword. She can be incredibly fast and can match the attacks of dark elves like Pirotess. Despite her occasional haughtiness (especially to Ghim), Deedlit is quite knowledgeable, always cautioning her comrades of potential dangers. name: Hiro Souma
description: __Zodiac Animal:__ Sheep Hiro is a very intelligent but verbally aggressive and smart-mouthed sophist. He is in love with [Kisa](https://anilist.co/character/371), and resents [Tohru](https://anilist.co/character/207) because she unwittingly monopolizes Kisa's time and attention. He starts out hostile to Tohru, but eventually eases his initial attitude through a combination of grudging admiration for Tohru and Kisa telling him to let up. He is sarcastic and pessimistic. description: Is a Third Generation pyrokinetic and is the Lieutenant of Special Fire Force Company 7. He is a very loyal subordinate of Benimaru Shinmon, willing to sacrifice his health and life to protect his friend if needed.

name: Palm Siberia
